mapper.select: SELECT agent_type AS agentType, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(latency_ms) AS avgLatency FROM ai_audit_logs WHERE created_at > #{since} GROUP BY agent_type
SELECT user_id AS userId, SUM(COALESCE(prompt_tokens, 0) + COALESCE(completion_tokens, 0)) AS totalTokens FROM ai_audit_logs WHERE created_at > #{since} GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY totalTokens DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_audit_logs WHERE agent_type = #{agentType}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_audit_logs WHERE agent_type = 'rag'
AND session_id = CAST(#{knowledgeBaseId} AS VARCHAR)
